tool_args.label: Debt Service Forecasting Methodology
tool_args.raw_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.

payload.claim_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.
payload.description: Explanation of how forecasted vs actual debt service are calculated and why they differ.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: Calendarization of Monthly Debt Service
tool_args.raw_text: the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12

payload.claim_text: the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12
payload.description: Methodology for monthly debt service deposit calculations, with timing differences explained.

evidence_refs.source_quote: the calendarization of monthly debt service deposits is calculated by dividing projected annual debt service by 12

tool_args.label: Debt Service Allocation Methodology
tool_args.raw_text: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.

payload.claim_text: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects. Allocation of 2 Broadway COPs is based on occupancy.
payload.description: How debt service is allocated to agency categories.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Debt service is allocated among Transit, Commuter, MTA Bus, and TBTA categories based on actual spending of bond proceeds for approved capital projects.

tool_args.label: Debt Service Forecasting Methodology
tool_args.raw_text: Forecasted debt service is calculated based upon projected monthly deposits from available pledged revenues into debt service accounts. Actual payments to bondholders are made from the debt service accounts when due as required for each series of bonds and do not conform to this schedule.
